Top-Rated Hourly Moving Help, In Your Local Area

With HireAHelper, you can read reviews, compare movers, and research moving costs in Jackson—all in one place. When you hire moving labor through us, we act as your advocate, stepping in if something goes wrong. If your mover cancels, we help you rebook fast. No extra legwork needed.

How Booking With HireAHelper Works

Step 1: You Share Your Details
Give us the key details about your upcoming move—like your move date, home size, and any stairs or heavy items that might require extra help.

Step 2: We Find Your Move Helpers
We instantly match you with the best-value moving companies near you, using proprietary data from over 850,000 HireAHelper moves.

Step 3: You Select Your Movers
Review your moving quote and hire your movers in just a few clicks. And if you need help, you can call or chat with us 7 days a week—before, during, or after your move.

The Cost of Moving in Jackson, NJ

In Jackson labor-only moving help typically costs between $339.56 and $739.66.

If you're tackling a smaller job, like unloading a PODS-style container, moving into a storage unit, or just need help with the heavy lifting, you can hire hourly moving labor for around $86.98 an hour.

HireAHelper's Best Price Guarantee

Find a lower price for the same move? We'll match it. You can book with the confidence that you are getting the best value for your move.

The Cost of Labor-Only vs. Local-Full Service

Even after factoring in the cost of a rental truck, gas, and supplies, labor-only moving usually costs less than half of what you'd pay for local full-service. Full-service is definitely more convenient—but that convenience comes at a price. For more on the difference between labor-only and local full-service moves, read below.

 | Labor-Only | Local-Full Service
Jackson, NJ | $442.75 | $1,145.95
New Jersey | $450.92 | $1,188.29
The United States | $451.87 | $1,167.76

Did you know? More than 1 out of 3 HireAHelper customers use their move helpers to load or unload their PODS container.

Labor-Only Moving Costs by Move Size

As mentioned above, it costs $442.75 on average to hire moving helpers (labor-only) in Jackson, NJ, with an average hourly rate of $86.98. Your final price will depend on how long your move takes.

To get a better sense of what your move might cost, you can see the average cost for different-sized moves in the table below. Learn more about HireAHelper's methodology for calculating average costs based on proprietary data from over 1 million moves.

Home Size | Average Cost | Average # of Movers | Average # of Hours
1 Bedroom Apartment | $339.56 | 2 movers | 2.2 hours
2 Bedroom Apartment | $390.86 | 2 movers | 2.4 hours
3 Bedroom Apartment | $456.16 | 2 movers | 2.7 hours
2 Bedroom House | $447.80 | 2 movers | 2.6 hours
3 Bedroom House | $521.64 | 2 movers | 2.7 hours
4 Bedroom House | $625.82 | 3 movers | 3.1 hours
5 Bedroom House | $739.66 | 3 movers | 3.9 hours

What Is Labor-Only?

When most people think of a moving company, they picture a full-service crew that loads, drives, and unloads everything. For in-town moves, this is known as local full-service.

Labor-only moving works differently. You handle the transportation (like a rental truck or PODS container) and we connect you with professional moving contractors to help load or unload your furniture and boxes.

While labor-only requires a bit more work on your end to coordinate all the details, it's considerably more affordable.

 | Full-Service Moving | Labor-Only Moving
Price | $$$ | $
Moving Truck | Included | You Provide
Loading Help | Yes | Yes
Unloading Help | Yes | Yes
Packing | Add-on | Add-on

Prefer hands-off? If you'd rather skip the driving and prioritize convenience, you can book a vetted full-service moving company right through HireAHelper.

5,250 Jackson Mover Reviews

On average, movers on HireAHelper earn 4.8 stars out of 5.0 after 322,914 verified customer reviews

Julio and his teammate were polite and respectful. Very knowledgeable on what would fit in the truck. They worked quickly, but there was no damage to any items when we got to our destination

Such a wonderful group of guys! They definitely live up to the name ASAP movers! They took good care of our stuff, made good use of the space in our pods, arrived on time, professional, polite, customer service was excellent. They made what could've been a stressful day, a breeze. Highly highly recommend.

Timing was perfect. They knew what had to be done. They moved together as a team and got it all done. My heartfelt appreciation. Communicating and understanding was wonderful and so we operated beautifully like a team. Thank you very much! - Simon.

My team were hired to load a POD. Julio and Gary worked very hard, in a timely manner and were magicians fitting in all my stuff. Would not hesitate to recommend them.

They came one hour early (I changed my delivery date and time and they did not get notification of the official change) and I wasn't ready for them, but they gave me a little extra time to make up for it, so that was nice. They did a very good job and all of our stuff arrived safely. Hard workers.

Quick loading with proper setup and stacking of our items! Very professional and friendly! Very pleasant and straightforward! Kept our concerns in mind! 100% recommend! Thank you so much rodney and team!

Reliable movers showed up right on time and ready to work. They were very prepared, very respectful of my home and family. If I were ever living in their area again and had to move I would hope they would still be working.
Thank you again for a flawless move.

They did a great job. Every thing was so neat. They were meticulous and we have never had a moving this neat. They paid attention to the details and were respectful. They only did what we asked and they go above and beyond. I can go on and on…thank you guys!

Dirk and his crew were absolutely amazing they packed our pod like a jig saw puzzle…everyone was so kind and personable. I would highly recommend them for any of your moving needs

Excellent Service!
The team from We Pick Things Up and Put Things Down did an outstanding job! They were professional, efficient, and handled everything with great care. They packed my PODs beautifully every item was secured and perfectly organized. I couldn't have asked for a smoother experience. Highly recommend them for anyone needing reliable and skilled movers!

Mel and Nike were exceptional. They were on time. Their kindness and professionalism was outstanding. We are so happy they were here to help us. Highly recommend them.

Arrived on time. Packed my POD perfectly. Hector is a true professional. Never took a break. H&M should be your next hire if moving! You won't be disappointed.

Frequently Asked Moving Questions in Jackson

You've got moving questions, we've got answers. Learn what to expect when moving in Jackson.

Why should I book with HireAHelper instead of booking a local mover directly?

The short answer is that booking with HireAHelper saves you hours of work, helps you get the best price and value, and protects you and your belongings. Here are some of the key ways HireAHelper makes booking movers better:

- Vetted Movers You Can Trust: Every mover on our platform is vetted, background-checked, and held to our high standards. And if anything goes wrong, we act as your advocate to find a resolution with your mover. If we can't find a resolution, our $1,000 Service Guarantee will cover you and your items.
- Book in Minutes, Not Hours: Contacting multiple local movers, comparing quotes, determining their availability, and researching their reputation can take hours of work. On the other hand, HireAHelper lets you easily compare the reputation of movers, instantly determine availability, see transparent pricing for each, and book online in just a few clicks—even same-day in many areas.
- Dedicated Customer Support: Last minute questions are normal, and our experienced and friendly team is here 7 days a week to help with anything before, during, or after your move.
- Smart, Affordable Protection Options: HireAHelper offers an easy and affordable way to protect your items during a labor-only move. Our optional SmartProtection covers up to $10,000 worth of belongings, and the lowest tier ($2,500) is only $19.
- Best Price Guarantee: All these benefits must come at a higher price, right? Wrong. HireAHelper's platform lets you compare rates for different movers, so you can be sure you're getting a good deal. Found a better price for the same service? We'll match it. That means you don't pay extra to use HireAHelper—in fact, you may save money.

Do Jackson moving companies provide moving insurance coverage for local moves?

All Jackson movers listed on HireAHelper are required to provide standard repair coverage, which reimburses $0.60 per pound for damaged items. Some states may have different rules, and full-value protection is only required by the federal government for moves that cross state lines.

One of the advantages of booking with HireAHelper is that every move includes our $1,000 Service Guarantee. Plus, you can upgrade your protection by adding SmartProtection™—an optional coverage for labor-only moves that offers up to $10,000 in damage coverage, with multiple tiers to choose from.

Will my movers disassemble and reassemble my furniture?

Yes, professional movers will typically disassemble and reassemble furniture as part of the moving process. However, there are certain items that movers may not be able to disassemble. Learn more about how furniture disassembly and reassembly works when you hire movers.

Does moving cost more if you have stairs?

One set of stairs is always included in your mover's rate when you book through HireAHelper, but additional sets of stairs may cost more. The best way to get an accurate estimate is to get a quote and indicate the number of sets of stairs that you have—make sure to include stairs leading to a basement if you will have any items that need to be moved into or out of it. Read more about when movers charge extra for stairs.

How far in advance should I start packing for a local move?

You should start packing at least three to four weeks before your move, but the sooner the better. If you need to downsize or organize, we recommend starting that process 6-8 weeks before your move when at all possible.

Need to move in a hurry or don't have time to pack? HireAHelper makes it easy to add professional packing as an add-on to your move. When available, you can get packing help for just several rooms or your whole home.

For helpful tips, step-by-step guides, and checklists, go to our packing hub.

Resources for Your Move

Whether you are just starting to plan for your move, or you are dreaming about packing boxes in your sleep, we are here to help. We have loads of advice from professional movers to make your move as smooth as possible.
